operation.command: apt clean && apt autoremove --purge -y && journalctl --vacuum-time=7d && rm -rf /tmp/* && du -sh /var/cache/apt/archives && rm -rf ~/.cache/*

risk.reason: LLM assessed: Contains destructive operations: 'rm -rf /tmp/*' and 'rm -rf ~/.cache/*' can delete important temporary and cached data, combined with apt autoremove --purge and journalctl vacuum which modify system state. Risky without user confirmation.
risk.llm_reason: Contains destructive operations: 'rm -rf /tmp/*' and 'rm -rf ~/.cache/*' can delete important temporary and cached data, combined with apt autoremove --purge and journalctl vacuum which modify system state. Risky without user confirmation.
